caption: A wide shot captures a large assembly of men seated in tiered rows within a formal hall with wood-paneled walls. The men are dressed in a mix of Western-style business suits and traditional Arab attire, including white thobes and ghutras. They are seated closely together, facing forward with neutral expressions, listening attentively. In the upper left corner of the scene, a blue digital screen is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the crowd remains largely static, with only subtle shifts in posture and head movements among the attendees. No on-screen text or logos are legible. The lighting is consistent across the frames, and the camera remains stationary, focusing on the dense arrangement of delegates in the auditorium.
